analysis.reasoning: Core message: China announces it has fully paid its 2020 UN assessed contributions and peacekeeping assessments, and asserts that paying on time and in full is an obligation for all member states, especially major countries. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not promoted; no criticism of the West or the US is present. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Promoted; the tweet underscores China's concrete support for the UN, multilateral obligations, and peacekeeping, portraying China as a responsible, cooperative actor. CH3 (epic history) – Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic) – Not addressed; focus is international conduct, not domestic system or values. CH5 (CCP governance succeeds) – Not applicable; no claim about domestic development or leadership success. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet advances CH2.
